definitions.text: brukt som tidsadverb: fremdeles på det tidspunktet
definitions.translation: used as a temporal adverb: still at that time

examples.no: da bodde de enda i Bergen
examples.en: at that time they still lived in Bergen
at that time he was still young

examples.no: vi har enda ikke sett noe til dem
examples.en: we still haven't seen anything of them

definitions.text: i tillegg til det som er nevnt eller er vanlig
definitions.translation: in addition to what has been mentioned or is usual

examples.no: de gikk enda tre kilometer innover i skogen
examples.en: they went another three kilometers farther into the forest

examples.no: fortsette enda noen år i bedriften
examples.en: continue for a few more years with the company

definitions.text: brukt foran komparativ for å uttrykke høyere grad
definitions.translation: used before a comparative to express a higher degree

examples.no: det kan jeg enda gå med på, men …
examples.en: I can still agree to that, but …

examples.no: det var da enda godt han hadde alarm
examples.en: it was a good thing, after all, that he had an alarm

definitions.text: brukt i uttrykk for ønske som ikke kan oppfylles
definitions.translation: used in expressions of wishes that cannot be fulfilled

examples.no: om det enda var så enkelt
examples.en: if only it were that simple
if only she had said something
if only he could have felt despair
